comment.body:
Is this the case ? 
https://x.com/VolSignals/status/2001370782354804896?s=20
Why can't the SPX find a bid yet today?Because without someone stepping in to buy hard delta (big blocks of futures), market makers have ~ 143 futures to sell every five minutesjust because the clock ticked.
